claims.text: The HR team needs to streamline the candidate screening process to reduce time-to-hire by 30% and improve the quality of shortlisted candidates, which is critical for our upcoming project that requires a quick onboarding of new talent.

natural_language: We need to get this HR screening use case with ChatGPT Enterprise up and running as soon as possible. The HR team is under pressure to reduce the time-to-hire and improve the quality of shortlisted candidates. This is crucial for our upcoming project, and we can't afford delays. We must ensure that no raw prompt logging or manager dashboards are enabled, in line with our non-negotiable red lines.

Procurement & Vendor Risk here. The DPA with OpenAI for ChatGPT Enterprise is now signed, so we can move forward. I see that the HR team is under pressure, and with the DPA in place, there's no issue from my end. Let's proceed with the necessary safeguards in place.

claims.text: HR screening is classified as a high-risk use case under the EU AI Act, and it requires a DPIA and specific safeguards.
